overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a dystopian urban environment. The journey begins in a shaded covered area with debris, transitions through sunlit streets with towering megabuildings, crosses an elevated construction walkway, and descends into narrow trash-filled alleyways with scattered NPCs.

events.description: exits covered walkway into bright sunlight
garbage truck drives past from left to right

agents.ego_description: moving steadily from shaded covered area onto the sunlit street, passing a worker in a safety vest

notable_agents.action: worker in orange safety vest standing near blue trash bags, facing away from camera

entered.detail: dark concrete overhang providing shade over the walkway
cluster of blue plastic garbage bags piled against the wall
red-brown corroded metal structure with graffiti
large dark green waste collection truck moving along the street
tall building with large yellow RAPID signage on facade

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit covered walkway with a worker standing near blue trash bags. The camera moves forward, exiting the shaded area into bright morning sunlight. A large garbage truck passes by on the right as the scene opens up to reveal a towering building with yellow RAPID signage in the distance.

events.description: turns right at intersection, moving past palm trees
approaches elevated walkway and construction area

agents.ego_description: navigating across the open street and turning right, passing through an intersection with scattered pedestrians

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street
massive futuristic skyscraper with intricate facade details
industrial structure emitting white steam
curved building with FUNDING signage on upper floors
ramp leading up to elevated pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking through a sunlit urban intersection surrounded by towering cyberpunk architecture. The RAPID building remains visible to the left while palm trees line the right side. The camera turns right and approaches an elevated walkway ramp, with the FUNDING building coming into view on the left.

events.description: ascends ramp to elevated walkway level
descends ramp back to street level

agents.ego_description: walking up an elevated ramp past construction barriers, then descending while observing the street below

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing sitting on a bench near the railing

entered.detail: silver metal safety railings along the elevated walkway
concrete blocks and yellow tape marking construction zone
tall industrial tower with yellow illuminated panels
enclosed pedestrian bridge connecting two buildings
purple and blue neon signs visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends an elevated walkway with metal railings, passing the FUNDING building at close range. Construction debris and barriers line the path. After reaching the upper level, the camera descends a ramp while neon signs become visible in the distant background, indicating a transition to a different district.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow trash-filled alley between tall buildings

events.description: encounters group of NPCs gathered near trash piles in the alley
passes close to wall with graffiti, temporarily blocking right side view

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow alleyway, passing scattered groups of NPCs and avoiding debris on the ground

notable_agents.action: person standing near metal railing, leaning against the wall

entered.detail: tall concrete walls of adjacent buildings creating a canyon effect
scattered garbage bags and debris accumulated along the alley walls
wall covered in colorful spray paint and street art
tall metal pole with traffic lights and cables
dense network of power lines and cables stretching between buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a narrow, shadowed alleyway flanked by towering walls covered in graffiti. Trash piles line the left side while NPCs stand and walk through the passage. Overhead cables crisscross between buildings, and the camera navigates past a utility pole toward the distant end of the alley where light is visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded urban corridor into a bright city center before descending into a claustrophobic, shadowed alleyway. It begins in a dimly lit covered walkway near a worker and blue trash bags, moving forward as the shade gives way to bright morning sunlight and a passing garbage truck. As the scene opens into a sunlit intersection, the camera passes palm trees and towering architecture, eventually turning right to ascend an elevated construction walkway with metal railings. The perspective then shifts as the camera descends from the upper level, leaving the open skyline behind to enter a narrow, graffiti-covered alleyway. Finally, the camera navigates through piles of trash and past scattered NPCs under a canopy of crisscrossing overhead cables, moving toward a distant point of light at the end of the passage.
